coachAM: Your gratitude entries are a veneer, masking a deep-seated avoidance of the discomfort required for true growth, evidenced by the "Fast dopamine" note and the constant pull toward "movil computa" over foundational habits like sleep and sovereign mornings. The root cause is a spiritual complacency, where the *idea* of God's forgiveness and new beginnings has replaced the *discipline* of honoring His gift of time and capacity, ultimately undermining the very "purposes" you claim to pursue. Today, before *any* screen, execute your Sovereign Morning and Training protocols back-to-back, demonstrating surrender through physical and mental friction.
